axis: nexus external-API bridge subsystem — rate-limit + retry + filesystem cache shim

trigger.F4_no_rate_limit: no bridge implements 429-detection or backoff; first 429 = sentinel FAIL
trigger.F5_no_response_cache: every health-check re-fetches identical URLs; @5min cron = 12 fetches/hr/bridge — polite-API violation
trigger.F6_no_retry_logic: single attempt per fetch; transient TLS/DNS blip = FAIL

bridge_inventory_recap.common_pattern_audited: all 16 use exec("curl -s --max-time N '<url>' ...") inside a fetch_*() helper function in the .hexa body — single call site per bridge — drop-in surface.

protocol_summary.stderr: silent on success; one diag block (raw 66 reason+fix) on persistent fail
protocol_summary.exit: 0 on cache-hit OR live 2xx; 1 on persistent fail (after retries) or deterministic 4xx (non-429)
protocol_summary.rate_limit: $CACHE_DIR/<bridge>.lastcall epoch-second; sleeps the delta if < min_interval since prior LIVE call

test_affordances.BRIDGE_HELPER_FORCE_FAIL: 1 = simulate persistent 429 without hitting network (validates retry+backoff timing)

compliance: raw 71 stderr-only diags + body unchanged on stdout

bridges_migrated_this_cycle.name: codata
bridges_migrated_this_cycle.diff_summary: fn fetch_codata_text() : single exec(curl ...) line replaced by exec(bash tool/bridge_helper.sh fetch codata <url> 3600 1 ...)
bridges_migrated_this_cycle.ttl_rationale: NIST CODATA constants table updates ~yearly; 1h TTL is conservative

health_after.source_label: live:nist.gov/cuu/Constants/Table/allascii.txt (cached body still labeled live since it WAS live-fetched)

bridges_migrated_this_cycle.sha256_pin_rotated: 3f9992f3d5893c59 → 367a2d3fa921e812 (logged to bridge_sha256_rotation_log.jsonl R5 OPT-D ledger; reason: ω-bridge-2 helper invocation fix)

bridges_migrated_this_cycle.name: pubchem
bridges_migrated_this_cycle.diff_summary: fn fetch_pubchem(name) : single exec(HEXA_RESOLVER_NO_REROUTE=1 curl ...) line replaced by exec(HEXA_RESOLVER_NO_REROUTE=1 bash tool/bridge_helper.sh fetch pubchem <url> 3600 1 ...)
bridges_migrated_this_cycle.ttl_rationale: PubChem compound records change rarely; NCBI policy ≤3 req/s — min_interval=1 sec satisfies polite-use

bridges_pending_migration.migration_template: for each bridge X with `let cmd = "curl ... '<URL>' ..."; let raw = exec(cmd)`, replace with: `let nexus_root = to_string(exec("printf '%s' \"${NEXUS_ROOT:-$HOME/core/nexus}\"")).trim(); let helper = nexus_root + "/tool/bridge_helper.sh"; let cmd = "bash '" + helper + "' fetch <X> '" + url + "' <ttl> <min_int> 2>/dev/null"; let raw = exec(cmd)`. Then bash tool/bridge_sha256_rotate.sh --bridge <X> --reason 'ω-bridge-3'.

oeis.rationale: OEIS b-files immutable per sequence ID

gw.rationale: GWOSC catalogue grows but historical entries stable

horizons.rationale: ephemeris time-of-day-sensitive but not minute-sensitive for selftest

arxiv.rationale: freshness anchor — tighter TTL keeps freshness signal alive

wikipedia.rationale: REST summary may revise; balance freshness vs polite-API

uniprot.rationale: ALSO needs sentinel-bug fix (F2) — pair with cache migration

bridges_pending_migration.estimated_diff_per_bridge: ~4-5 line addition; <30 LOC across all 14 bridges combined

cache_validation.method: cleared cache, ran each bridge twice in quick succession via `gtimeout 30 hexa run tool/<bridge>.hexa [<args>]`, captured wall-clock ms with date +%s%N

codata.interpretation: 1013ms saved per call = curl + TLS + NIST round-trip eliminated; production cron @ 5min ⇒ 11 of every 12 fetches/hour now serve from disk cache (TTL=3600)

pubchem.interpretation: PubChem REST round-trip ~870ms saved per cached call; satisfies NCBI ≤3 req/s polite-use policy

cache_validation.post_cache_full_health_check: bash tool/bridge_health.sh --quiet → __BRIDGE_HEALTH__ PASS total=16 pass=16 fail=0 tampered=0 duration_ms=48000

retry_validation.method: BRIDGE_HELPER_FORCE_FAIL=1 BRIDGE_HELPER_VERBOSE=1 bash tool/bridge_helper.sh fetch testbridge https://example.invalid/never-cached-2026 3600 1
observed_trace: stderr: bridge_helper: synthetic-429 persistent fail after 3 attempts (FORCE_FAIL=1)
stderr: reason: BRIDGE_HELPER_FORCE_FAIL=1 simulating sustained rate-limit
retry_validation.verdict: retry+backoff path works; ec=1 on persistent fail; reason+fix trailers emitted (raw 66); body stays empty (raw 71 — caller bridge can engage hardcoded fallback path on its end)
retry_validation.live_429_simulation: skipped (would require pointing real bridge at deliberately-failing URL — contradicts no-live-API-hammering constraint). FORCE_FAIL synthetic mode validates the same control flow without external impact.

compliance_notes.raw_66: every error path on bridge_helper.sh emits reason: + fix: trailers
compliance_notes.raw_71: stderr-only diagnostics; stdout body contract preserved bit-for-bit
compliance_notes.raw_73: minimal: bash 3.2 portable, no python; deterministic 4xx no-retry
compliance_notes.raw_77: additive only — bridge_sha256.tsv rotated through ledger (R5 OPT-D), no destructive overwrite
compliance_notes.raw_80: no new sentinel surface (helper is invisible to bridges' own __NAME_BRIDGE__ sentinels)
session_constraints_honored: hexa-only friendly (helper is bash, but called via existing `exec(...)` mechanism — bridges remain hexa)
no mass migration (1+1=2 bridges only as instructed)
no live API hammering (cache-cleared then 1+1 cold calls + 1+1 warm; FORCE_FAIL synthetic for retry test)

to_undo_codata_migration: 1. Edit tool/codata_bridge.hexa fn fetch_codata_text(): restore original `let cmd = "curl -s --max-time 10 '" + url + "' 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'inverse fine-structure' | head -1"`
2. Drop nexus_root + helper local vars (revert to 2-line helper-free body)
to_undo_pubchem_migration: 1. Edit tool/pubchem_bridge.hexa fn fetch_pubchem(name): restore original `let cmd = "HEXA_RESOLVER_NO_REROUTE=1 curl -s --max-time 12 '" + url + "' 2>/dev/null"`
to_kill_helper_globally: set BRIDGE_HELPER_DISABLE=1 in env (cron) → helper becomes raw curl passthrough; no bridge edits needed
OR rm tool/bridge_helper.sh → both migrated bridges fall back to their fallback-on-empty paths
rollback.cache_eviction: bash tool/bridge_helper.sh cache-clear all   (or per-bridge: cache-clear codata)
rollback.ledger_provenance: state/bridge_sha256_rotation_log.jsonl carries the 4 rotation entries (2 per bridge: initial migration + invocation-fix), hash-chained via R5 OPT-D

follow_ups_for_omega_bridge_3: migrate the 14 remaining bridges using the documented template + per-bridge TTL recommendations above
consider adding ETag/If-Modified-Since support to helper for upstreams that honor it (Wikipedia REST, OpenAlex)
add a `bridge_helper.sh stats` subcommand that aggregates per-bridge cache-hit-rate from the .meta sidecar timestamps
fix uniprot F2 sentinel-bug while migrating (orthogonal but co-located)
